title: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) Debuts SAPIEN 3 Ultra RESILIA Valve
text: Edwards Lifesciences' (EW) SAPIEN 3 Ultra RESILIA valve combines its breakthrough RESILIA tissue technology with the SAPIEN 3 Ultra transcatheter aortic heart valve.

title: Edward Lifesciences (EW) Gains From New Products Amid Cost Woe
text: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) expects full-year 2022 underlying sales to grow on the back of strength in demand for products used in more intense surgeries.

title: OCPNY or EW: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: OCPNY vs. EW: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
